
---
title: "single_cell_markers"
author: "YinCY"
format: html
editor: source
---

# immune cell markers
- T Cell: CD3D, CD3E, CD8A, CD4, CD2
    + CD4 T Cell: CD3D, CD3E, CD4
    + CD8 T Cell: CD3D, CD3E, CD8A

```{r}
markers_tcell <- list(
    # T Cell
    # "T Cell" = c("CD3D", "CD3E"),

    # CD4
    # "CD4T" = c("CD4"), 
    "Th1" = c("CXCR3", "STAT1", "TBX21"), 
    "Th2" = c("PTGDR2", "GATA3", "BATF", "IRF4", "STAT6"), 
    # "Th17" = c("CCR6", "RORC"), 
    "Tfh" = c("CXCR5", "ICOS"), 
    "Treg" = c("IL2RA", "FOXP3", "LRRC32"), 
    
    # CD8
    # "CD8T" = c("CD8A", "CD8B"), 
    # "naive" = c("CD27", "SELL", "IL7R", "CCR7"), 
    "effector T" = c("IL2RB", "KLRG1", "IL2RA", "CD69"), 
    "effector memory T" = c("PTPRC", "KLRG1", "IL7R", "TNF", "IFNG"), 
    "central memory T" = c("SELL", "CCR7", "IL7R"), 

    # NK
    "NK" = c("NCAM1", "CD244", "GNLY", "GZMA", "GZMK"), 
    "ILC1" = c("NCAM1", "ITGAE", "CXCR3")
    # "ILC2" = c("KIT", "IL2RA", "GATA3", "GFI1"), 
    # "ILC3" = c("KIT", "IL7R", "IL7A", "IL17F", "IL22", "AHR", "TBX21", "TCF7"), 
    # "LTi" = c("KIT", "IL17", "IL22", "LTA", "AHR", "ID2", "CCR6", "CD7", "IL2RA"), 

    # "NKT" = c("TRAV24", "IL4", "IL10", "IL13", "IFNG", "TNF", "CD4", "CD8A", "ID2"), 
    # "gdT" = c("TRG", "TRD", "CD70", "CSF2", "CD5", "FCGR3A", "CD27")
)

markers <- list(
    # T Cell
    "T Cell" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC", "TRBC1"), 

    # CD4
    "CD4T" = c("CD4"), 
    # "Th1" = c("IFNG", "STAT4", "TBX21"), 
    # "Th2" = c("PTGDR2", "GATA3", "BATF", "IRF4", "STAT6"), 
    # "Th2" = c("IL4", "IL5", "IL13", "GATA3"), 
    # "Th17" = c("CCR6", "RORC"), 
    # "Th17" = c("IL17A", "IL17F", "RORC", "KLRB1"), 
    "Tfh" = c("CXCR5", "ICOS", "PDCD1", "BCL6", "CXCL13"), 
    "Treg" = c("IL2RA", "FOXP3", "CTLA4", "IKZF2", "TNFRSF4"), 
    # "Th-like" = c("CXCL13", "PDCD1", "TIGIT"), 

    # CD8
    "CD8T" = c("CD8A", "CD8B"), 
    # "naive" = c("CD27", "SELL", "IL7R", "CCR7"), 
    # "effector T" = c("IL2RB", "KLRG1", "IL2RA", "CD69"), 
    "effector memory T" = c("PTPRC", "KLRG1", "IL7R", "TNF", "IFNG"), 
    # "central memory T" = c("SELL", "CCR7", "IL7R"), 
    # "naive T" = c("CCR7", "SELL", "LEF1", "TCF7", "NOSIP"), 
    "effector T" = c("GZMB", "PRF1", "GNLY", "NKG7", "IFNG"), 
    # "memory T" = c("IL7R", "CD44", "GZMK", "CXCR3"), 
    "exhausted T" = c("PDCD1", "LAG3", "HAVCR2", "TIGIT", "TOX", "ENTPD1"), 
    # "pre-exhausted T" = c("GZMK", "EOMES", "CXCL13"), 
    # "resident memory T" = c("ITGAE", "CXCR6", "CD69", "CD101"), 

    # NK
    "NK Cell" = c("NCAM1", "CD244", "GNLY", "GZMA"), 
    # "ILC1" = c("NCAM1", "ITGAE", "CXCR3"), 
    # "ILC2" = c("KIT", "IL2RA", "GATA3", "GFI1"), 
    # "ILC3" = c("KIT", "IL7R", "IL7A", "IL17F", "IL22", "AHR", "TBX21", "TCF7"), 
    # "LTi" = c("KIT", "IL17", "IL22", "LTA", "AHR", "ID2", "CCR6", "CD7", "IL2RA"), 

    # "NKT" = c("KLRB1", "CD161", "ZBTB16"), 
    # "gdT" = c("TRGC1", "TRGC2", "TRDC", "TRGV9"), 
    "Proliferating T" = c("TOP2A", "MKI67", "PCNA", "STMN1")
    # "MAIT" = c("SLC4A10", "TRAV1", "TRAV2", "KLRB1"), 
    # "NK-like T" = c("KLRD1", "KLRB1", "FCGR3A")
)
```


- B Cell: CD79A, CD79B, MS4A1, BANK1, CD19, Ly6d, Igkc
    + Plasma Cell: IGHG1, MZB1, SDC1, CD79A
    + plasmablast B: MKI67, CD38, CD86
        - An activated mature (naive or memory) B cell that is secreting immunoglobulin, typified by being CD27-positive, CD38-positive, CD138-negative
    + pro-B: CD19, CD10, RAG2, VPREB, CD179B, MKI67, IL7RA
        - A progenitor cell of the B cell lineage, with some lineage specific activity such as early stages of recombination of B cell receptor genes
    + pre-B: 
    + germinal center B: MKI67, HGAL
        - A rapidly cycling mature B cell that has distinct phenotypic characteristics and is involved in T-dependent immune responses and located typically in the germinal centers of lymph nodes.
    + marginal zone B: CD27, CD22, CD1, CD180, CD23-
        - 	A mature B cell located in the marginal zone of the lymph node.
    + transitional B: CD38, CD24, CD19
        - An immature B cell of an intermediate stage between the pre-B cell stage and the mature naive stage with the phenotype surface IgM-positive and CD19-positive, and are subject to the process of B cell selection.
    + follicular B: 
    + immature B: CD19, CD24, IGHM, RAG2, IGLL5
    + memory B: 
    + naive B: MS4A1, CD22, CD37, CD19, TCL1A

markers_bcell <- list(
    "memory" = c("TLR6", "TLR7", "TLR10", "CIR1", "PAX5"), 
    "plasma" = c("IGHG1", "MZB1", "SDC1", "CD79A"),
    "germinal center" = c("BCL6", "CD81", "IRF8", "PAX5"), 
    "marginal zone" = c("CR2", "SPIB", "CD81", "ITGAE"), 
    "follicular" = c("FCER2", "IGHD")
)


- NK Cell: NKG7, GZMA, NCAM1, GZMB, FGFBP2, FCG3RA
    + CD56bright NK: NCAM1(CD56), IL2RB, SELL
    + CD56dim NK: FCGR3A, KLRB1
    + resident NK: ITGA1, ITGAE, CXCR6
    + adaptive NK: KLRC2, FCER1G, ZBTB32


- Monocyte
    + human: CD14, FCGR3A
    + mouse: Csf1r, Ly86, Irf8


- Macrophage: C1QA, C1QB, C1QC, CX3CR1, ADGRE1, CD14, CD68, CD163, LYZ, FCGR3
```{r}
# from: 10.3390/ijms22136995
# human
markers_macrophage <- lits(
    "M0" = c("CSF1R", "CD14", "CD68", "ITGAM"), 
    "M1" = c("CD86", "MARCO", "CXCL9", "CXCL10", "CXCL11", "NOS2", "SOCS1", "FCGR1A"), 
    "M2" = c("TGM2", "FCER2", "ARG1", "CCL22", "CD163", "MRC1")
)

# mouse
markers_macrophage <- list(
    "M0" = c("Csf1r", "Adgre1", "Itgam"), 
    "M1" = c("Marco", "Cxcl9", "Cxcl10", "Cxcl11", "Nos2", "Socs1"), 
    "M2" = c("Mrc1", "Tgm2", "Retnla", "Chil3", "Arg1", "Ccl22", "Cd163")
)
```


- Dendritic Cell: LILRA4, PTCRA, ITGAX, CLEC9A
    + cDC: XCR1, FLT3, CCR7, CD1E
    + pDC: SIGLECH, CLEC10A, CLEC10A, CLEC12A, CLEC4C


- Platelet: PF4, TAGLN2


- Myeloid Cell: FCGR3A, CD14


- Granulate: "CCR3", "CD33", "IL5RA"
    + Neutrophil(中性粒细胞): CD14, ELANE, MME, MPO
    + Eosinophil(噬酸性粒细胞): CCR1, FCAR, IFNAR1, ITGA4, SIGLEC8
    + Basophil(噬碱性粒细胞): CD9, CD22, CD36, CD40LG, FCGR2B

- Mast cell: CST3, CPA3, KIT, TPSAB1, TPSB2, MS4A2, CMA1, CPE, CXCR4, IL10RA, PTGER2

- Red Blood Cell: 
    + mouse: Hba-a1, Hba-a2, Hbb-b1, Hbb-b2, Hbd, Hbg1, Hbg2, Hbe1
    + human: HBA1, HBA2, HBB, HBD, HBG1, HBG2, HBE1
        + 在婴儿阶段主要表达：HBG1, HBG2和HBE1


# endothelial cell markers
- Endothelial: PECAM1, CDH5, KDR, LY6C(Ly6c1), CLDN5, ABCB1, EBF1
    + venous: SELE, CSF3, IL6, G0S2, CLU, MMP1
    + atory: IGFBP3, CXCL12, FOS, CXCL3, HEY1, FN1, TCIM
    + capilary: RBP7, FABP4, ESM1, CD36, C11orf96
    + lyphatic: PROX1, PDPN, LYVE1, FTL4, CCL21, DSP, ITGA9, MRC1, DPP4
        - LEC I： ACKR4, NT5E, CAV1, NTS, NUDT4
        - LEC II： CCL20, CXCL1, CXCL2, CXCL3, CXCL5, TNFRSF9, ACKR1
        - LEC III: MFAP4, LYVE1
        - LEC IV: LYVE1, PDPN, VEGFR3, SPHK1, CD36, CCL21, NRP2, ITIH3, PTX3
        - LEC V: CLDN11, ESAM, FOXC2, CD9, CAV1, GJA1, ANGPT2, CLDN5, GJA4
        - LEC VI: LYZ, ACKR1, CXCL1, CXCL2, CXCL3, CD206, CD209, CLEC4M, CLEC4G, MARCO, ICAM1, VCAM1, CADM3, CD44, LYVE1

![](figures/PMID37744339.png){width=100%}

# Epithelial cell markers
- Epithelial: EPCAM, KRT19, PROM1, CD24


# Stromal cell markers
- Fibroblast: FGF7, CNN1, COL1A1, COL3A1, VIM, LUM
- Vascular smooth muscle cell: MYH11, DCN, ACTA2, TAGLN, TAGLN2
- Pericyte: CSPG4, PDGFRB
- Adipocyte: Adipoq


# central neuron system markers
from GSE212199

- Astrocytes: AQP4, ADGRV1, GPC5, RYR3
- Microglia: C3, LRMDA, DOCK8
- OPC: TNR, IGSF21, NEU4, GPR17
- Ependymal: CFAP126, FAM183B, TEME212, PIFO, TEKT1, DNAH12
- Oligodendrocytes: MBP, PLP1, ST18
- Inhibitory: GAD1, LHFPL3, PCDH15
- Excitatory: CAMK2A, CBLN2, LDB2

- "neuron" = c("TUBB3", "UCHL1", "NEFL", "NEFM", "NEFH", "RBFOX3")
- "schwann" = c("S100B", "SOX10", "NGFR", "GFAP", "MPZ", "MBP")


# liver
- Hepatocyte: Alb, Afp, Anxa1, Anxa2


# heart
    "Atrial myocyte" = c("Nppa", "Gja5"), 
    "Ventricular myocyte" = c("Actn2", "Myh6", "Tnnt2"), 
    "Cardiomyocyte" = c("Acta1", "Actc1", "Tnnc1", "Tnnc3"), 
    "Cardiac Conduction system" = c("Cacna2d2", "Hcn4", "Tbx3", "Cacna1g", "Ephb3"), 
    "Endothelial" = c("Pecam1", "Tie1", "Flt1", "Fabp4", "Epas", "Egfl7"), 
    "Macrophage" = c("Cd68", "Cd74", "Lgals3", "Itgam"), 
    "Smooth muscule Cell" = c("Rgs5", "Tpm2"), 
    "Erythroid Cell" = c("Gata1", "Klf1", "Runx1", "Tal1", "Cldn6", "Cldn7", "Epcam"), 
    "Mesoderm derived Cell" = c("Cdh11", "Col3a1", "Pcolce"), 


# tumor
## MDSC
markers_myeloid <- list(
    "MDSC" = c("OLR1", "FATP2", "CD84", "SIGLEC5") # myeloid and MDSCmarkers discriminate from neutrophils
    "M-MDSC" = c("+" = "OLR1", "+" = "ITGAM", "+" = "CD14", "+" = "CD33", "-" = "HLA-DRA", "-" = "FUT4"), 
    # "PMN-MDSC" = c("+" = "FUT4", "+" = "CEACAM8", "+" = "ITGAM", "-" = "CD14"), 
    "G-MDSC" = c("+" = "ITGAM", "+" = "FUT4", "+" = "CEACAM8", "-" = "HLA-DRA", "-" = "CD14"), 
    "E-MDSC" = c("+" = "ANPEN", "+" = "CD33", "-" = "CD14", "-" = "FUT4", "-" = "HLA-DRA", "-" = "CD3"), 
    "Monocyte" = c("CD14", "CD33", "SIRPA", "IRF5", "STAT1"), 
    "M1" = c("IFNG", "IL1A", "IL1B", "FCGR3A", "FCGR2A"), 
    "M2" = c("IL10", "TGFB1", "IDO1", "CSF1R", "MSR1", "IRF4", "STAT6"), 
    "resident Mac" = c("AXL", "CCR2", "NOS2"), 
    "neutrophils" = c("S100A8", "S100A9", "LY6G", "CSF3R", "SLC25A37")
    # "cDC" = c("ITGAX", "CD40", "CD1B", "CD1C", "CCR7", "IDO1", "LAMP3"), 
    # "pDC" = c("IL3RA", "CLEC4C", "NRP1")
)

markers_myeloid <- list(
    "G-MDSC" = c("+" = "ITGAM", "-" = "CD14", "+" = "FUT4", "+" = "CEACAM8", "+" = "LOX1", "+" = "CD84"), 
    "M-MDSC" = c("+" = "CD14", "-" = "FUT4", "-" = "HLA-DRA"), 
    "E-MDSC" = c("+" = "ANPEN", "+" = "CD33", "-" = "CD14", "-" = "FUT4", "-" = "HLA-DRA", "-" = "CD3"), 
    "monocyte" = c("+" = "CD14", "-" = "FUT4", "-" = "HLA-DRA", "CD33", "SIRPA", "IRF5", "STAT1"), 
    "neutrophils" = c("+" = "ITGAM", "-" = "CD14", "+" = "FUT4", "+" = "CEACAM8", "S100A8", "S100A9", "LY6G", "CSF3R", "SLC25A37"), 
    "macrophage INHBA" = c("CCL4", "IL1RN", "INHBA"), 
    "Macrophage NLRP3" = c("NLRP3", "EREG", "IL1B"),
    "Macrophage LYVE1" = c("LYVE1", "PLTP", "SEPP1"),
    "Macrophage C1QC" = c("C1QC", "C1QA", "APOE")
)

## CAF
markers_fibroblast <- list(
    # "fibro" = c("COL1A1", "COL3A1"),
    # "myCAF" = c("ACTA2", "RGS5", "MYH11"), 
    "iCAF" = c("CCL2", "CXCL12", "CXCL14"), 
    "proCAF" = c("IGF1", "OGN", "C7"), 
    "matCAF" = c("COL10A1", "CTHRC1", "POSTN"), 
    "CAF" = c("ACTA2", "TAGLN", "CTHRC1"), 
    # "NF" = c("DCN", "IGFBP6", "MFAP5"), 
    "epiCAF" = c("EPCAM", "CD24"),
    "apCAF" = c("CD74", "HLA-DRA"), 
    # "meCAF" = c("PLA2G2A", "CRABP2"), 
    "pCAF" = c("BIRC5", "TOP2A"), 
    "TGFB-CAF" = c("TAGLN", "LRRC15"), 
    "IL1-CAF" = c("HAS1", "CCL2")
    # "positive marker" = c("PDPN", "COL1", "PDGFRA")
    # "negative markers" = c("PTPRC", "PECAM1", "EPCAM", "CSPG4", "RGS5", "PROM1", "CD24", "KDR", "CDH5")
)

## lung, human
markers <- list(
    # endothelial
    "EC" = c("PECAM1", "CDH5", "KDR"),
    "EC lymph" = c('PROX1', "PDPN", "LYVE1", "RELN", "NRP2"), 
    "EC arterial" = c("EFNB2", "SOX17", "BMX", "SEMA3G", "HEY1", "LTBP4", "FBLN5", "GJA5", "GJA4"), 
    "EC capillary" = c("CA4", "PRX", "RGCC", "SPARC"), 
    "EC venous" = c("NR2F2", "VCAM1", "ACKR1", "SELP"), 
    "EC tip cell" = c("ANGPT2", "APLN", "KCNE3", "RAMP3", "PDF", "ADM", "PDGFB"),

    # epithelial
    "AT1" = c("AGER", "HOPX", "PDPN", "AQP5"), 
    "AT2" = c("SFTPB", "SFTPC", "SFTA2", "SFTPA2", "SFTPA1", "SLC34A2", "NAPSA", "ABCA3"), 
    "Basal" = c("KRT5", "KRT15", "KRT16", "KRT6A", "KRT7", "S100A2", "TP63"), 
    # "Suprabasal" = c("KRT19", "S100A2", "SERPINB4", "SERPINB3", "PERP", "MIR205HG"), 
    "Goblet" = c("BPIFB1", "CYP2F1", "MSMB", "LCN2", "CHST9"),
    "Club" = c("SFTPB", "SCGB3A2", "SLPI", "CYP2B7P"),
    "Ciliated" = c("FOXJ1", "PIFO", "TPPP3", "RSPH1"),
    "Ionocyte" = c("ASCL3", "FOXI1", "BSND"),
    "Tuft Cell" = c("ASCL2", "DCLK1", "LRMP", "CD24A", "POU2F3"),
    "PNEC" = c("CHGA", "SLC35D3", "GRP", "ASCL1", "BEX1"),

    # stromal
    "Fibroblast" = c("FGF7", "CNN1", "COL1A1", "COL3A1", "VIM", "LUM"),
    "SMCs" = c("MYH11", "DCN", "ACTA2", "TAGLN", "TAGLN2"),
    "Pericyte" = c("CSPG4", "PDGFRB"),
    "Mesothelial" = c("PRG4", "WT1", "CALB2", "PLA2G2A", "HAS1"),

    # myeloid
    "Monocyte" = c("CD14", "FCGR3A"),
    "Dendritic cell" = c("LILRA4", "PTCRA", "ITGAX", "CLEC9A"),
    "Langerhans" = c("CD68", "CD163", "MRC1", "CTSB"),
    "Mast Cell" = c("CD207", "FCER1A", "HLA-DRB1", "HLA-DQA1"),
    "Granulate" = c("CCR3", "CD33", "IL5RA"),
    "Platelet" = c("PF4", "TAGLN2"),

    # lymphoid
    "B Cell" = c("CD79A", "CD79B", "MS4A1", "BANK1", "CD19"),
    "Plasma" = c("IGHG1", "MZB1", "SDC1", "CD79A"),
    "T Cell" = c("CD3D", "CD3E", "CD8A", "CD4", "CD2", 'TRAC', "TRBC1", "TRBC2"),
    "NK Cell" = c("NCAM1", "CD244", "GNLY", "GZMA", "GZMK", "NKG7", "NCR1", "KLRD1", "FCGR3A"),
    "ILC" = c("XCL1", "XCL2", "KLRB1", "CD7"),

    "RBC" = c("HBA1", "HBA2", "HBB")
)

## lung, mouse, from PMID: 38370670
markers <- list(
    "Endothelial" = c("Cdh5", "Pecam1", "Kdr", "Emcn"), 
    "AT1" = c("Aqp5", "Ager", "Rtkn2"), 
    "AT2" = c("Sftpb", "Lamp3"), 
    "Pericyte" = c("Notch3", "Cspg4", "Pdgfrb"), 
    "SMCs" = c("Acta2", "Myh11", "Cnn1"), 
    "Fibroblast" = c("Fn1", "Col1a1", "Col3a1"), 
    "Cilliated" = c("Gm867", "Cdhr3", "Scgb3a2"), 
    "aMacro" = c("Olr1", "F7", "Atp6v0d2"), 
    "iMacro" = c("C1qa", "C1qb", "Ms4a7"), 
    "inMacro" = c("Ifitm6", "Gpr141"), 
    "Dendritic Cell" = c("Xcr1", "Sept3"), 
    "Neutrophil" = c("S100a9", "S100a8", "Mmp9"), 
    "B Cell" = c("Ighm", "Cd79a", "Cd79b", "Ms4a1"), 
    "T Cell" = c("Cd3d", "Cd3e", "Cd3g", "Trac", "Trbc1"), 
    "NK Cell" = c("Klrb1c", "Klre1", "Ncr1"), 
    "LEC" = c("Ccl21a", "Prox1", "Reln"), 
    "Proliferation Cells" = c("Top2a", "Mki67")
)

# pancrease
```{r}
markers <- list(
        # immune
        "T Cell" = c("Cd3d", "Cd3e", "Trac", "Ptprc"),
        "NK Cell" = c("Nkg7", "Gnly", "Fgfbp2"),
        "B Cell" = c("Ms4a1", "Cd79a", "Cd19"),
        "Plasma" = c("Ighg4", "Ighg1", "Jchain"),
        "Monocyte" = c("Cd14", "Fcgr3a", "Lyz", "Vcan"),
        "Macrophage" = c("C1qa", "C1qc", "Cd68", "Adgre1"),
        "Dendritic Cell" = c("Cst3", "Fcer1a", "Cd1c"),
        "Neutrophil" = c("Csf3r", "Cst3", "G0s2"),
        
        "Proliferation" = c("Mki67", "Top2a", "Tuba1b", "Stmn1"),
        
        "Ductal" = c("Krt19", "Sox9", "Spp1", "Muc1", "Prom1", "Epcam", "Aldh1a3"),
        "Acinar" = c("Prss1", "Amy2a", "Cpa1", "Cela3b", "Ptf1a", "Mist1"),

        "Alpha" = c("Gcg", "Arx", "Pax6"),
        "Beta" = c("Ins2", "Ins1", "Pdx1", "Nkx6-1", "Mafa"),
        "Delta" = c("Sst", "Ghsr"),
        "Epsilon" = c("Ghrl"),
        "PP Cell" = c("Ppy"),

        "Endothelial" = c("Fabp5", "Vwf", "Pecam1", "Kdr", "Cdh5", "Flt1"),
        "Fibroblast" = c("Col1a1", "Col3a1", "Col1a2", "Vim"),
        "Pericyte" = c("Cspg4", "Pdgfrb"),
        "VSMCs" = c("Acta2", "Myh11", "Cnn1"), 
        "Stallete Cell" = c("Rbp1", "Des", "Gfap", "Vim")
)
```
